case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. CLINTON REILLY HOLDINGS, LLC DBA MERCHANTS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT CLINTON REILLY HOLDINGS, LLC DBA MERCHANTS EXCHANGE BUILDING AND ITS SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
